ORDER BY s.state_name ASC, sub_district_count DESC;
raw_output:

gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT ds.sub_district_name
FROM dim_sub_district ds
JOIN fact_outpatient_services fos ON ds.sub_district_id = fos.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month dm ON fos.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE ds.type_of_area ILIKE 'Rural'
  AND dy.year_value = 2021
GROUP BY ds.sub_district_name
ORDER BY SUM(fos.outpatient_attendance_allopathic) DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:

question: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டு முழுவதும் பதிவு செய்யப்பட்ட அனைத்து அலோபதி வெளிப்புற நோயாளி வருகைகளின் மொத்த அளவை அடிப்படையாகக் கொண்டு, துணை மாவட்டங்களையும் அவற்றின் பகுதி வகைகளையும் முதலிடத்தில் இருந்து வரிசைப்படுத்துங்கள்.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT sd.sub_district_name, sd.type_of_area, SUM(fos.outpatient_attendance_allopathic) AS total_outpatient_attendance
FROM fact_outpatient_services fos
JOIN dim_sub_district sd ON fos.sub_district_id = sd.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month m ON fos.month_id = m.month_id
JOIN dim_year y ON m.year_id = y.year_id
WHERE y.year_value = 2021
GROUP BY sd.sub_district_name, sd.type_of_area
ORDER BY total_outpatient_attendance DESC;
raw_output:

JOIN dim_year y ON m.year_id = y.year_id
WHERE y.year_value = 2021
GROUP BY sd.sub_district_name, sd.type_of_area
ORDER BY total_outpatient_attendance DESC;
